name: plan-lifecycle
description: Plan, refine, review, and hand off work.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, refine, review, and hand off work.
interface.longDescription: Plan Lifecycle coordinates research, repo triage, release planning, test strategy, data workflow planning, adversarial review, and handoff for implementation plans.
defaultPrompt: Use $plan-lifecycle to refine this plan, delegate specialist review, and make it execution-ready.
